Uses of Class
it.tdlight.jni.TdApi.Minithumbnail

  • Uses of TdApi.Minithumbnail in it.tdlight.jni

    Fields in it.tdlight.jni declared as TdApi.Minithumbnail
    Modifier and Type Field Description
    TdApi.Minithumbnail TdApi.Audio.albumCoverMinithumbnail
    The minithumbnail of the album cover; may be null.
    TdApi.Minithumbnail TdApi.Animation.minithumbnail
    Animation minithumbnail; may be null.
    TdApi.Minithumbnail TdApi.ChatPhoto.minithumbnail
    Photo minithumbnail; may be null.
    TdApi.Minithumbnail TdApi.ChatPhotoInfo.minithumbnail
    Chat photo minithumbnail; may be null.
    TdApi.Minithumbnail TdApi.Document.minithumbnail
    Document minithumbnail; may be null.
    TdApi.Minithumbnail TdApi.Photo.minithumbnail
    Photo minithumbnail; may be null.
    TdApi.Minithumbnail TdApi.ProfilePhoto.minithumbnail
    User profile photo minithumbnail; may be null.
    TdApi.Minithumbnail TdApi.Video.minithumbnail
    Video minithumbnail; may be null.
    TdApi.Minithumbnail TdApi.VideoNote.minithumbnail
    Video minithumbnail; may be null.
    Constructors in it.tdlight.jni with parameters of type TdApi.Minithumbnail
    Constructor Description
    Animation​(int duration, int width, int height, String fileName, String mimeType, boolean hasStickers, TdApi.Minithumbnail minithumbnail, TdApi.Thumbnail thumbnail, TdApi.File animation)
    Describes an animation file.
    Audio​(int duration, String title, String performer, String fileName, String mimeType, TdApi.Minithumbnail albumCoverMinithumbnail, TdApi.Thumbnail albumCoverThumbnail, TdApi.File audio)
    Describes an audio file.
    ChatPhoto​(long id, int addedDate, TdApi.Minithumbnail minithumbnail, TdApi.PhotoSize[] sizes, TdApi.AnimatedChatPhoto animation)
    Describes a chat or user profile photo.
    ChatPhotoInfo​(TdApi.File small, TdApi.File big, TdApi.Minithumbnail minithumbnail, boolean hasAnimation)
    Contains basic information about the photo of a chat.
    Document​(String fileName, String mimeType, TdApi.Minithumbnail minithumbnail, TdApi.Thumbnail thumbnail, TdApi.File document)
    Describes a document of any type.
    Photo​(boolean hasStickers, TdApi.Minithumbnail minithumbnail, TdApi.PhotoSize[] sizes)
    Describes a photo.
    ProfilePhoto​(long id, TdApi.File small, TdApi.File big, TdApi.Minithumbnail minithumbnail, boolean hasAnimation)
    Describes a user profile photo.
    Video​(int duration, int width, int height, String fileName, String mimeType, boolean hasStickers, boolean supportsStreaming, TdApi.Minithumbnail minithumbnail, TdApi.Thumbnail thumbnail, TdApi.File video)
    Describes a video file.
    VideoNote​(int duration, int length, TdApi.Minithumbnail minithumbnail, TdApi.Thumbnail thumbnail, TdApi.File video)
    Describes a video note.
